subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! This Day is such that should any soul let slip an opportunity, its restoration shall not be attainable throughout countless ages [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله الیوم یومیست که اگر از نفسی امری فوت شود بقرنهای لایحصی تدارک آن
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
